text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. It goes beyond simple word recognition to grasp the meaning and context of text. For example, NLP powers machine translation tools that convert phrases between languages, like from English to Spanish. It also enables sentiment analysis, which determines if a piece of writing is positive, negative, or neutral. This is useful for businesses analyzing customer feedback. Additionally, chatbots rely on NLP to interpret user questions and provide helpful responses in real time. From smart assistants to online customer service, NLP is changing how we interact with technology.
